'''鈭歯g-ng-s''' ('''ngangasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:teleclone|teleclone]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ng-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:teleclone|teleclone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-ng-s
|-
! Lemma
| ngangasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngangasithi|ngangasithi]] || [[word:ngangasiji|ngangasiji]] || [[word:ngangasishi|ngangasishi]] || [[word:ngangasi|ngangasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangasuthuth|ngangasuthuth]] || [[word:ngangasujuj|ngangasujuj]] || [[word:ngangasushush|ngangasushush]] || [[word:ngangas|ngangas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangasuthu|ngangasuthu]] || [[word:ngangasuju|ngangasuju]] || [[word:ngangasushu|ngangasushu]] || [[word:ngangasu|ngangasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangasufuth|ngangasufuth]] || [[word:ngangasufuj|ngangasufuj]] || [[word:ngangasufush|ngangasufush]] || [[word:ngangasuf|ngangasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngangasethe|ngangasethe]] || [[word:ngangaseje|ngangaseje]] || [[word:ngangaseshe|ngangaseshe]] || [[word:ngangase|ngangase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangasothoth|ngangasothoth]] || [[word:ngangasojoj|ngangasojoj]] || [[word:ngangasoshosh|ngangasoshosh]] || [[word:ngangas|ngangas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangasotho|ngangasotho]] || [[word:ngangasojo|ngangasojo]] || [[word:ngangasosho|ngangasosho]] || [[word:ngangaso|ngangaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangasofoth|ngangasofoth]] || [[word:ngangasofoj|ngangasofoj]] || [[word:ngangasofosh|ngangasofosh]] || [[word:ngangasof|ngangasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngangas忙th忙|ngangas忙th忙]] || [[word:ngangas忙j忙|ngangas忙j忙]] || [[word:ngangas忙sh忙|ngangas忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngangas忙|ngangas忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangasathath|ngangasathath]] || [[word:ngangasajaj|ngangasajaj]] || [[word:ngangasashash|ngangasashash]] || [[word:ngangas|ngangas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangasatha|ngangasatha]] || [[word:ngangasaja|ngangasaja]] || [[word:ngangasasha|ngangasasha]] || [[word:ngangasa|ngangasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangasafath|ngangasafath]] || [[word:ngangasafaj|ngangasafaj]] || [[word:ngangasafash|ngangasafash]] || [[word:ngangasaf|ngangasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngangasasha|ngangasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongangasasha|gongangasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingangasasha|gokingangasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngangasn眉sha|ngangasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongangasnkn眉sha|gongangasnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingangasn眉sha|gokingangasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngangash毛sha|ngangash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongangasnksh毛sha|gongangasnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingangash毛sha|gokingangash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangasrosha|ngangasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangasnkrosha|gongangasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangasrosha|gokingangasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangasmusha|ngangasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangasnkmusha|gongangasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangasmusha|gokingangasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngangasherasha|ngangasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongangasnksherasha|gongangasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingangasherasha|gokingangasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngangasngasha|ngangasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongangasnkngasha|gongangasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingangasngasha|gokingangasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngangasyasha|ngangasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongangasnkyasha|gongangasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingangasyasha|gokingangasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngangasyamasha|ngangasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongangasnkyamasha|gongangasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingangasyamasha|gokingangasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngangasn眉sh毛sha|ngangasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongangasnkn眉sh毛sha|gongangasnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingangasn眉sh毛sha|gokingangasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangasn眉rosha|ngangasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangasnkn眉rosha|gongangasnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangasn眉rosha|gokingangasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangasn眉musha|ngangasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangasnkn眉musha|gongangasnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangasn眉musha|gokingangasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngangash毛n眉sha|ngangash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongangasnksh毛n眉sha|gongangasnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingangash毛n眉sha|gokingangash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangash毛rosha|ngangash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangasnksh毛rosha|gongangasnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangash毛rosha|gokingangash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangash毛musha|ngangash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangasnksh毛musha|gongangasnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangash毛musha|gokingangash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngangasron眉sha|ngangasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongangasnkron眉sha|gongangasnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingangasron眉sha|gokingangasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngangasrosh毛sha|ngangasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongangasnkrosh毛sha|gongangasnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingangasrosh毛sha|gokingangasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangasromusha|ngangasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangasnkromusha|gongangasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangasromusha|gokingangasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngangasmun眉sha|ngangasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongangasnkmun眉sha|gongangasnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingangasmun眉sha|gokingangasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngangasmush毛sha|ngangasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongangasnkmush毛sha|gongangasnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingangasmush毛sha|gokingangasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangasmurosha|ngangasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangasnkmurosha|gongangasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangasmurosha|gokingangasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngangas|ngangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙ng忙s|ng忙ng忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongangas|hongangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙ng忙s|hong忙ng忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongangas|hohongangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙ng忙s|hohong忙ng忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngangas|n眉ngangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙ng忙s|n眉ng忙ng忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngangas|n眉n眉ngangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙ng忙s|n眉n眉ng忙ng忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngangas|n茂ngangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙ng忙s|n茂ng忙ng忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngangas|n茂n茂ngangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙ng忙s|n茂n茂ng忙ng忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungangas|lungangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙ng忙s|lung忙ng忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungangas|lulungangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙ng忙s|lulung忙ng忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingangas|lingangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙ng忙s|ling忙ng忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingangas|lilingangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙ng忙s|liling忙ng忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongangas|kongangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙ng忙s|kong忙ng忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongangas|kokongangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙ng忙s|kokong忙ng忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengangas|kengangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙ng忙s|keng忙ng忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengangas|kekengangas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙ng忙s|kekeng忙ng忙s]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
